testcase.name: test_activate_customer
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inactive_users_and_csv_export.py:185: in test_activate_customer assert resp2.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_customer_not_found_returns_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inactive_users_and_csv_export.py:196: in test_customer_not_found_returns_404 assert resp.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 403 E assert 403 == 404 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_user_not_found_returns_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inactive_users_and_csv_export.py:205: in test_user_not_found_returns_404 assert resp.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 403 E assert 403 == 404 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_export_customers_csv
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inactive_users_and_csv_export.py:217: in test_export_customers_csv assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403: {"detail":"Account is inactive. Contact your administrator."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
